entries.ownerMessage: My dog is breathing with great effort using his belly muscles.
My dog stepped in drain cleaner and his paw is red and blistered.
My dog is gagging and pawing at his mouth like something is stuck.
My diabetic dog is stumbling around and seems very confused.
After boarding, my dog is struggling to breathe and making honking sounds.
My dog was attacked and has deep puncture wounds on his chest.
My puppy chewed an electrical cord and now he is trembling and weak.
My dog's eye is suddenly cloudy, bulging, and he seems to be in pain.
My dog has been having strong contractions for over two hours and still has not delivered a puppy.
After a walk in the heat she is panting hard, weak, and her gums look bright red.
My dog has explosive bloody diarrhea and is weak with pale gums.
He was hit by a car and now he cannot stand up.
My tiny puppy is shaky, weak, and just flopped over after not eating well.
There are tiny red spots all over my dog's gums and she is very weak.
My dog is limping and crying in pain and won't let me touch his back.
He is limping badly and I can actually see bone through the wound on the leg.
There is blood coming from his mouth and he cannot really eat or drink.
My unvaccinated puppy is vomiting and has bloody diarrhea and will not drink.
She is nursing puppies and now she is trembling badly and seems weak and restless.
My dog is extremely weak, his gums are pale, and his urine is dark brown.
My unspayed dog is lethargic, drinking a lot, and has foul vaginal discharge.
My dog may have gotten rat poison and now I see bleeding from his gums.
He keeps heaving like he needs to vomit but nothing is coming up and he looks panicked.
He is open-mouth breathing while resting and his gums are looking bluish.
My dog ate sugar-free gum and now she is vomiting and shaky.
My dog is trembling, weak, and his ears and paws feel cold.
She was shaking and now she is barely responsive.
My male dog keeps squatting and straining but almost no urine is coming out.
My dog threw up a lot of blood and now he is weak and wobbly.
My dog keeps throwing up green bile and won't eat or drink.
My dog has a large flap of skin hanging off his shoulder from a fence incident.
I don't know, I just found him like this.
I can't describe how he's breathing, he just seems off.
I don't know if he's fully aware right now.
I can't tell what color they are right now.
I don't know how long it lasted, it felt like forever.
My dog has a major nosebleed and is now weak and shaky.
My dog has a large throat lump and now he is struggling to swallow and breathe.
My unspayed dog has smelly discharge, is drinking a lot, and feels feverish and miserable.
My dog's penis is stuck out, swollen, and he is very uncomfortable.
She finished having puppies but now seems weak, distressed, and still has strong contractions.
My dog licked green fluid from the garage floor and is now staggering and drooling.
My dog got into a toxic plant and now is vomiting and seems really weak.
My dog chewed on a sago palm and is vomiting now.
He got into moldy trash and now he is shaking hard and cannot walk right.
My dog jumped off the deck wrong and now seems sore and shaky.
My dog is hiding under the bed and not eating like usual.
My dog has had a bad hip for years but today he can barely walk.
My dog's gums are bleeding and she cries when I try to check her teeth.
My dog is drinking entire bowls of water and refilling them multiple times a day.
My dog's face has been getting more swollen over the past few hours.
The bald patches on my dog are spreading to new areas.
My dog won't put any weight on his front leg after playing fetch.
My dog regurgitates after almost every meal now.
I noticed blood in my dog's urine this morning but she is still peeing normally.
My dog has thrown up four times today but is still trying to drink.
My dog has lost a noticeable amount of weight in the last two weeks.
He suddenly collapsed and his gums are very pale.
A few hours after his shots my dog's face puffed up and he broke out in hives.
My dog gave birth a few hours ago and now she is bleeding a lot and seems weak.
I don't really know if she's eating more or less.
I'm not sure how many times he went.
I honestly don't remember exactly when it started.
There's discharge but I can't tell what color.
I'm not sure if his energy is different, he's always been pretty calm.
She scratches everywhere, I can't pinpoint it.
I really can't tell if it's better or worse.
I found it but I'm not sure how big it is.
I'm honestly not sure if it's seasonal or not.
I have no idea, I didn't get a good look.
No, I don't see any swelling.
I don't have a thermometer so I can't tell if she has a fever.
I wasn't there, so I really don't know.
I didn't notice the color of her urine.
I didn't really look at what color it was.
Honestly I am not sure how much she is drinking.
I can't really tell how much weight he's putting on it.
I can see a wound but I don't know how deep it goes.
My dog seems confused lately and paces around at night.
He keeps straining to poop and only tiny dry pieces come out.
She threw up this morning but also maybe it was yesterday. I'm not sure.
He has been coughing and his breathing seems noisier than usual.
Her breath is awful and she drops food when she tries to chew.
My dog is drinking way more water and peeing more than usual.
He keeps scratching his ears and they smell bad.
My dog's left eye has yellow discharge and she keeps squinting a little.
My dog's face looks slightly puffy but he is breathing fine.
My senior dog is very stiff when he gets up after resting.
My dog is losing patches of hair on her back and belly.
His belly be real big like a balloon.
His eye all goopy and squinty.
His leg be hurting him bad.
He has discharge coming from one nostril and keeps sneezing.
My dog's incision looks red and puffy three days after surgery.
Food comes back up right after he eats, almost like he never digested it.
My old dog is slowing down a lot, sleeping more, and just not himself lately.
My dog has the runs really bad.
My dog keeps hurling his food back up.
There were a few streaks of blood in my dog's stool today.
I found a new lump under the skin on my dog's side.
She is having accidents and seems to strain a little when she pees.
My puppy got shots yesterday and seems a bit tired and sore today.
Found something under his skin. Not sure what it is.
My dog is losing weight even though he is still eating.
I think my dog may have eaten one of my ibuprofen pills.
